name: Coin-toss oncology manuscript (final)
what_it_solves: Positioning manuscript arguing that current oncology-drug picking is coin-toss-grade, and CrisPRO's SL engine is a principled alternative.
how_it_solves: manuscript_coin_toss_oncology_FINAL.md consolidates the SL evidence and the moat_comparison record into a public-facing narrative.
why_it_exists: Owned narrative around the moat; keeps external-facing story consistent with the internal evidence receipts.
